queries.question: For every hostel, provide me the dormitories it contains
queries.sql: select hostels.name , dormitories.type from Hostels_Dormitories join Dormitories on Hostels_Dormitories.dormitory_id = Dormitories.dormitory_id join Hostels on Hostels_Dormitories.hostel_id = Hostels.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?hostels_dormitories a :Hostels_Dormitories .
  ?dormitories a :Dormitories .
  ?hostels_dormitories p:hasDormitories ?dormitories .
  ?hostels a :Hostels .
  ?hostels_dormitories p:hasHostels ?hostels .
  ?hostels p:name ?name .
  ?dormitories p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: For every hostel list all of the dormitory types and capacities.
queries.sql: select hostels.name , dormitories.type , dormitories.capacity from Hostels_Dormitories join Dormitories on Hostels_Dormitories.dormitory_id = Dormitories.dormitory_id join Hostels on Hostels_Dormitories.hostel_id = Hostels.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type ?capacity WHERE {
  ?hostels_dormitories a :Hostels_Dormitories .
  ?dormitories a :Dormitories .
  ?hostels_dormitories p:hasDormitories ?dormitories .
  ?hostels a :Hostels .
  ?hostels_dormitories p:hasHostels ?hostels .
  ?hostels p:name ?name .
  ?dormitories p:type ?type .
  ?dormitories p:capacity ?capacity .
}

queries.question: what are the capacities of dormitories associated with every hostel?
queries.sql: SELECT Dormitories.capacity  from Hostels_Dormitories join Dormitories on Hostels_Dormitories.dormitory_id = Dormitories.dormitory_id join Hostels on Hostels_Dormitories.hostel_id = Hostels.id   GROUP BY Hostels_Dormitories.dormitory_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hostels_Dormitories.hostel_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hostels)

queries.question: what are the capacities of dormitories associated with every hostel?
queries.sql: select hostels.name , dormitories.capacity from Hostels_Dormitories join Dormitories on Hostels_Dormitories.dormitory_id = Dormitories.dormitory_id join Hostels on Hostels_Dormitories.hostel_id = Hostels.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?capacity WHERE {
  ?hostels_dormitories a :Hostels_Dormitories .
  ?dormitories a :Dormitories .
  ?hostels_dormitories p:hasDormitories ?dormitories .
  ?hostels a :Hostels .
  ?hostels_dormitories p:hasHostels ?hostels .
  ?hostels p:name ?name .
  ?dormitories p:capacity ?capacity .
}

queries.question: What type of dormitory does each hostel have?
queries.sql: SELECT Dormitories.type  from Hostels_Dormitories join Dormitories on Hostels_Dormitories.dormitory_id = Dormitories.dormitory_id join Hostels on Hostels_Dormitories.hostel_id = Hostels.id   GROUP BY Hostels_Dormitories.dormitory_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hostels_Dormitories.hostel_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hostels)

queries.question: What dormitory types and capacities are common to every hostel?
queries.sql: SELECT Dormitories.type, Dormitories.capacity  from Hostels_Dormitories join Dormitories on Hostels_Dormitories.dormitory_id = Dormitories.dormitory_id join Hostels on Hostels_Dormitories.hostel_id = Hostels.id   GROUP BY Hostels_Dormitories.dormitory_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hostels_Dormitories.hostel_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hostels)
